title: croton maritimus var. monanthogynus
intro: Croton maritimus var. monanthogynus, also known as the monanthogynous seaside croton, is a plant species within the Euphorbiaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, derived from its sap and roots. The health benefits of Croton maritimus var. monanthogynus include relief from pain, reduction of inflammation, and protection against infections. The plant is often prepared as a poultice or used in herbal teas and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
